notes:
Seti Astro Suite Pro

V1.19.0
New Tools:
SLaP Toolkit (Solar Lunar and Planetary). Tool to organize the various features in saspro into a one stop show for your SLaP processing.

Saturation and Chroma tool. Using either Chroma or Saturation and selectively make custom hue curves for image adjustment.

FX Tool. Add some pop to your image with Orton Glow, Star Glow, Soft Focus, Vignetting, Split Tone, and Film Grain.

Other improvements to Curves and Hyperbolic tool, Planetary Stacker, and more.

Post3 Fixed initial release bugs as well as set up Linux for Syqon Starless CLI
